message:
fix(ui): resolve mobile view and 3D rendering issues

- Fix 3D atom colors: Removed vertexColors: true from InstancedMesh material in structure-loader.ts to allow instance colors to render correctly.
- Fix SequenceView sizing: Removed fixed height in App.tsx and implemented responsive default height (60vh/70vh) in SequenceView.tsx.
- Fix UI polish: Added CSS to hide ViewModeToggle text on small screens and improved .detail-viewers layout for mobile responsiveness.
